subject: [RFC PATCH 21/40] mm: page_alloc: adopt partial pageblocks from tainted superpageblocks

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch modifies the page allocation mechanism in Linux to adopt partially free pageblocks from tainted superpageblocks during refilling of the per-cpu page pool (PCP). It introduces a new phase in the multi-phase approach used by rmqueue_bulk, which searches for partially-free pageblocks with sub-pageblock buddy entries matching the requested migratetype. The patch aims to reduce fragmentation spread to clean superpageblocks and concentrates non-movable allocations into already-tainted superpageblocks.
